dropdownItems: Special Programs for Seniors and Anxious Learners

intro.heading: Your Trusted Partner on the Road to Your License
intro.description: Supportive instructors, clear communication, and modern cars ensure a stress‑free path to your driving license

intro.heading: Driving Education You Can Trust
intro.description: Since 2018, Dualisa has been dedicated to helping new drivers start their journey with confidence. With professional instruction and a supportive approach, we guide learners step by step toward their Swiss driving license

servicesDetails.title: Category B Driving Lessons
servicesDetails.description: Professional, patient, and modern driving lessons in safe training cars

servicesDetails.title: First Aid Course
servicesDetails.description: Learn how to react in emergency situations and recieve the official certificate

servicesDetails.title: Theory Test Preparation Course
servicesDetails.description: Prepare efficiently for the Swiss theory exam with structured lessons, clear explanations, and practice questions that help you understand road rules instead of memorising them

servicesDetails.title: Traffic Study Course (VKU)
servicesDetails.description: The mandatory VKU course that teaches you how to recognize dangers, read traffic situations, and drive proactively — an essential step before the practical exam

servicesDetails.title: Completion Course (WAB)
servicesDetails.description: Complete the mandatory WAB training day required during your 3‑year probation period to obtain your full Swiss driving license

servicesDetails.title: Special Programs for Seniors and Anxious Learners
servicesDetails.description: Gentle, patient, and individually adapted lessons designed for seniors, nervous beginners, and learners with specific needs
